library.name: Basic Scene Grammar
library.description: Core scene-based grammar library for high-frequency structures, contrastive function words, and sentence frames.

items.title: because + clause
items.coreExplanation: “because + clause”用来直接、明确地说明原因；because后面接完整从句（主语+动词）。
items.usageNote: 可放句中或句尾：I left because I was tired. / Because I was tired, I left. 句首时常用逗号隔开主句。

slotSchema.label: reason clause
slotSchema.hint: 完整原因从句（主语+动词）

commonErrors: because后面只接名词：because the rain（应为because of the rain或because it rained）
把because当介词用：because of he was late（应为because he was late）
句首Because从句后不加逗号导致阅读困难（写作中建议加）

contrasts.title: because of + noun / v-ing
contrasts.note: because后接从句；because of后接名词/动名词：because of the rain / because of being late。

contrasts.title: since + clause (reason)
contrasts.note: since更“顺带说明/已知原因”，语气通常比because弱、更书面一些。

contrasts.title: because of + noun / v-ing
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

contrasts.title: since + clause
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

contrasts.title: as + clause
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

examples.sentence: I stayed home because I was sick.
examples.translation: 我待在家里，因为我生病了。

examples.sentence: Because the meeting was canceled, we went back early.
examples.translation: 因为会议取消了，我们就提前回去了。
examples.note: 句首原因从句后常用逗号。

templates.label: Give a direct reason
templates.exampleSentence: I can't go because I have to work.
templates.exampleTranslation: 我不能去，因为我得工作。

items.title: since + clause (reason)
items.coreExplanation: “since + clause”表示原因，语气常把原因当作双方已知/默认的背景信息，重点在主句的结论或行动。常放句首，较常用于书面或较正式表达。
items.usageNote: 注意不要与表示时间的 since（“自从……”）混淆；表示原因时通常可用逗号把从句与主句分开，尤其句首。

slotSchema.label: since 从句（原因）
slotSchema.hint: 陈述一个被视为已知/合理的原因

slotSchema.label: 主句（结果/决定）
slotSchema.hint: 表达结论、建议或采取的行动

commonErrors: 把 since 当“自从”用在原因句里，导致时间/原因混淆
用 since 引出“对方未知、需要强调的新原因”，语气不自然（更适合 because）
从句用疑问句或倒装（since 后一般用正常陈述语序）

contrasts.title: because + clause
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

contrasts.title: as + clause (reason)
contrasts.note: 语气更弱、更客观；与 since 类似但更“顺带一提”的感觉。

contrasts.title: as + clause
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

examples.sentence: Since you’re already here, we can start the meeting.
examples.translation: 既然你已经到了，我们可以开始开会了。
examples.note: 把原因当作共同已知的背景，重点在“开始开会”。

examples.sentence: Since it was raining, we stayed home.
examples.translation: 因为当时在下雨，我们就待在家里了。
examples.note: 书面叙述中常用；也可用 because 但语气更强调原因。

templates.label: Since (reason)
slotHints: sinceClause: 已知/默认的原因（完整陈述）
mainClause: 结论/决定/行动（完整陈述）
templates.exampleSentence: Since the deadline is tomorrow, we should finish it today.
templates.exampleTranslation: 既然截止日期是明天，我们今天就应该把它做完。

items.title: although + clause
items.coreExplanation: 用 although 引导让步从句，表示“尽管/虽然…，但…”。常放句首并用逗号与主句分开，也可放句中。
items.usageNote: 偏书面、较正式；注意 although 后面必须接完整从句（主语+谓语）。

slotSchema.label: Concession clause
slotSchema.hint: 完整从句：主语+谓语，如 although it was raining

slotSchema.label: Main clause
slotSchema.hint: 主要结果/立场，如 we went out

commonErrors: although 后面只接名词/动名词：although the rain（应改 despite the rain 或 although it was raining）
although 和 but 同时使用：Although..., but ...（应去掉 but 或改用 Yet/Still）
从句不完整：Although tired, ...（可用 Though tired 更口语；或改 Although I was tired, ...）

contrasts.title: even though + clause
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

contrasts.title: despite + noun / v-ing
contrasts.note: 后接名词/动名词而非从句：Despite the rain / Despite being tired, ...

contrasts.title: despite + noun / v-ing
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

examples.sentence: Although the deadline was tight, we finished the report on time.
examples.translation: 尽管截止时间很紧，我们还是按时完成了报告。
examples.note: 句首让步从句+逗号，书面常见。

examples.sentence: We decided to go ahead although some people disagreed.
examples.translation: 尽管有些人不同意，我们还是决定继续推进。
examples.note: although 也可放句末，逗号通常可省略。

templates.label: Basic
templates.exampleSentence: Although I was nervous, I spoke clearly.
templates.exampleTranslation: 尽管我很紧张，我还是讲得很清楚。

items.title: if + present, will / can + base
items.coreExplanation: 用来表达“如果某个现实/可能发生的条件成立，那么将会/能够做某事”。if从句用一般现在时（表示将来条件），主句用will或can+动词原形。
items.usageNote: if从句不要用will；可以用can表示能力/许可。两句顺序可互换。

slotSchema.label: If-clause condition
slotSchema.hint: 一般现在时表达将来条件，如 you finish early

slotSchema.label: Main-clause result
slotSchema.hint: will/can + 动词原形，如 I will call you

commonErrors: 在if从句里用will：If it will rain...（应为 If it rains...）
主句动词不用原形：will goes / can to go（应为 will go / can go）
把一般现在误解为“现在”，不敢用来指将来条件

contrasts.title: unless + clause
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

contrasts.title: if + past, would + base
contrasts.note: 用于不真实/假设情况：If I had time, I would help you（现在不太可能/与事实相反）。

contrasts.title: if + past, would + base
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

examples.sentence: If you finish early, you can leave.
examples.translation: 如果你提前做完，你就可以走。

examples.sentence: If it rains tomorrow, we'll stay home.
examples.translation: 如果明天下雨，我们就待在家。
examples.note: if从句用一般现在rains表示将来条件。

templates.label: Real future condition
slotHints: condition: 一般现在时的条件句
result: will/can + 动词原形的结果句
templates.exampleSentence: If you need help, I will explain it again.
templates.exampleTranslation: 如果你需要帮助，我会再解释一遍。
